title: Essentialism
author: Greg McKeown
description: Do less but better by ruthlessly eliminating the nonessential. 5 Claude Code skills for disciplined pursuit of what matters most.
longDescription: Greg McKeown's Essentialism is not about getting more done in less time — it is about getting only the right things done. The way of the Essentialist involves a disciplined, systematic approach to determining where your highest point of contribution lies, then making execution of those things almost effortless. In a world that celebrates busyness and rewards saying yes, Essentialism provides the framework and permission to say no to everything except what is truly essential. These skills translate McKeown's methodology into practical tools for defining your essential intent, mastering the art of no, analyzing trade-offs, editing your life, and designing effortless execution systems.
